home.title: Windows to the Past
home.description: VIERNULVIER has always been a beacon of culture in Ghent. Our digital archive preserves these fragments of time — from the roar of underground concerts to the quiet poetry of experimental theatre.

history.title: The Echoes of the Building
history.heroAlt: A black-and-white photo of the inauguration of the Vooruit Festivities Hall in 1914, with a large crowd in front of the entrance.

users.title: User management
users.description: Review active accounts and make lightweight account changes without leaving the overview.

form.passwordCreateHint: New users need a password before the account can be created.

notFound.quote: Minder is sometimes meer, but sometimes not
